releaseNotes: Server hardened against malformed API responses from Supabase, AniList, MangaDex, and Wikidata — null safety checks prevent crashes on unexpected or partial data.
Server now gracefully exits with a clear message if the configured port is already in use, instead of hanging silently.
Fixed crash in content search and home endpoints when third-party APIs return incomplete payloads.
MangaDex chapters and metadata parsing is now fully null-safe for items missing attributes or relationships.
